topic: CADS: A Systematic Literature Review on the Challenges of Abstractive Dialogue Summarization
topic_definition: This review targets studies on abstractive dialogue summarization and its methodological and task-related challenges.
summary: This repository accompanies a systematic literature review on abstractive dialogue summarization and reports a final evidentiary set formed through predefined inclusion/exclusion screening.

required.criterion: 研究主題為 dialogue summarization，且論文為學術論文（long 或 short paper）。

exclusion_criteria.criterion: Non-English primary dataset (主要資料集非英文).
Multi-modal studies incorporating visual or audio elements (結合視覺或音訊元素的多模態研究).
Focus on extractive rather than abstractive summarization (偏重抽取式而非抽象式摘要).
Usage of non-Transformer-based methods (未使用 Transformer 架構的方法).
